news.title: Led by US, exits from gold ETFs continue for the 5th week in a row
news.summary: Last week, outflows were a record high for the year so far, as investors chose to cash out over $4 for every $1 inflow in these physically-backed funds

news.title: Sensex today | Stock Market Live: Sensex, Nifty trade higher but lose momentum as metal stocks drag markets
news.summary: Sensex, Nifty, Share Prices LIVE: Equity benchmarks traded higher but trimmed gains in afternoon trade on Tuesday, as profit booking in heavyweight stocks offset optimism from easing crude oil prices and supportive global cues, while metal stocks dragged the broader market lower.

news.title: Sensex, Nifty hold gains off day’s high, metal stocks slump over 2%, Hindalco, NALCO, Vedanta Aluminium top losers
news.summary: Earlier in the day, Sensex had climbed 460 points to 76,724.62, while Nifty 50 rose 124 points to 23,977.80, supported by a rally in global equities and cooling oil prices following the peace agreement between the US and Iran.

news.title: CVS Health's Comeback Is Just Getting Started -- and Its Valuation Still Looks Shockingly Cheap
news.summary: Key PointsCVS Health's financial results are improving due to several initiatives.
